documentation.description:
The following "+" definitons simply make the "+" method visible
to client using this package, simplifying the overal usage of the
ZanyBlue.Text library.

subprograms.code:
function "+" (Time_Value : Ada.Calendar.Time)
   return ZanyBlue.Text.Times.Time_Argument_Type

function "+" (Value : Exception_Occurrence)
   return ZanyBlue.Text.Exceptions.Exception_Argument_Type

function "+" (Unbounded_String_Value : Unbounded_String)
   return ZanyBlue.Text.Strings.String_Argument_Type

function "+" (Unbounded_Wide_String_Value : Unbounded_Wide_String)
   return ZanyBlue.Text.Wide_Strings.Wide_String_Argument_Type

function "+" (Boolean_Value : Boolean)
   return ZanyBlue.Text.Booleans.Boolean_Argument_Type

function "+" (Character_Value : Character)
   return ZanyBlue.Text.Characters.Character_Argument_Type

function "+" (Duration_Value : Duration)
   return ZanyBlue.Text.Durations.Duration_Argument_Type

function "+" (Float_Value : Float)
   return ZanyBlue.Text.Floats.Float_Argument_Type

function "+" (Integer_Value : Integer)
   return ZanyBlue.Text.Integers.Integer_Argument_Type

function "+" (Float_Value : Long_Float)
   return ZanyBlue.Text.Long_Floats.Float_Argument_Type

function "+" (String_Value : String)
   return ZanyBlue.Text.Strings.String_Argument_Type

function "+" (Wide_Character_Value : Wide_Character)
   return ZanyBlue.Text.Wide_Characters.Wide_Character_Argument_Type

function "+" (Wide_String_Value : Wide_String)
   return ZanyBlue.Text.Wide_Strings.Wide_String_Argument_Type

subprograms.name: Disable_Exceptions
subprograms.code: procedure Disable_Exceptions

documentation.description: Disable exceptions for missing arguments, invalid formats, etc.

subprograms.name: Disable_Source_Locales
subprograms.code: procedure Disable_Source_Locales

documentation.description: Disable usage of source locales for message argument formatting.

subprograms.name: Disable_Wide_IO
subprograms.code: procedure Disable_Wide_IO

documentation.description:
Enable usage of Ada.Text_IO.Current_Output for Print/Print_Line
when no explicit destination is defined.

subprograms.name: Enable_Exceptions
subprograms.code: procedure Enable_Exceptions

documentation.description: Enable exceptions for missing arguments, invalid formats, etc.

subprograms.name: Enable_Source_Locales
subprograms.code: procedure Enable_Source_Locales

documentation.description: Enable usage of source locales for message argument formatting.

subprograms.name: Enable_Wide_IO
subprograms.code: procedure Enable_Wide_IO

documentation.description:
Enable usage of Ada.Wide_Text_IO.Current_Output for Print/Print_Line
when no explicit destination is defined.

subprograms.name: Standard_Catalog
subprograms.code: function Standard_Catalog return Catalog_Type

documentation.description:
Return the standard catalog managed by the ZanyBlue library to hold
normal application messages.  Explicit reference to a catalog is not
normally used, in this context, this standard catalog is used.

subprograms.name: Write_Message

documentation.description:

file.
